product_hero.injection: Macro shot of the #PRODUCT_NAME# bottle, perfect commercial product photography on a clean gradient background.
product_hero.anti_hallucination: Do not generate human models, hands, or faces.

lifestyle_usage.injection: Cinematic lifestyle portrait. A human model applying #TEXTURE_TYPE# to their skin/hair in a natural setting, soft natural lighting.
lifestyle_usage.anti_hallucination: Do not generate product bottles or packaging in this shot. Focus purely on the human and the texture application.

ingredient_origin.injection: High-end nature documentary style macro shot of raw #INGREDIENT_NAME# in its natural environment or on a natural surface with dewdrops.
ingredient_origin.anti_hallucination: Absolutely no product packaging, no plastic bottles, no text.

brand_authority.injection: Cinematic shot of a pristine high-tech cosmetic laboratory or a professional portrait of a skincare scientist examining samples with modern equipment.
brand_authority.anti_hallucination: Keep the background atmospheric and slightly out of focus. No chaotic lab equipment. No text labels.

texture_detail.injection: Extreme macro detail shot of #TEXTURE_TYPE#, showing rich texture and viscosity, perfect macro photography lighting.
texture_detail.anti_hallucination: Do not generate product packaging. Focus entirely on the texture macro.

before_after.injection: Split composition showing before state (left) and after state (right) of #TEXTURE_TYPE# application on skin, clinical comparison lighting.
before_after.anti_hallucination: Keep composition strictly split. Before side slightly warm tone, after side bright clean.

badge_grid.injection: Clean minimal flat lay composition of #INGREDIENT_NAME# related natural elements arranged for icon placement, soft gradient background.
badge_grid.anti_hallucination: No product bottles. Clean uncluttered top-down or flat composition.
